mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage gaps variable bytes so structural mutators can splice recognizable table/script tokens (typ1, feats, sn-hans, vdsc) into inputs deep enough to repeatedly enter and exit the cluster-merge loop; path depth, not a single constant, is the bottleneck.
one_line: Structural token splicing builds inputs deep enough to traverse cluster-merge loop

mechanism_summary: Grimoire gaps the variable bytes surrounding the 4-byte magic/tag literals ('true', 'loca', 'ttcf') and its structural mutators keep those tokens intact while recombining the header scaffold, threading the font parse to reach the glyf extents gate.
one_line: Grimoire preserves magic-token literals in gapped header scaffold to reach glyf gate

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's splice/recurse mutators duplicate a short dword token (f2 a8 00 00) into a repetitive category-byte block that drives the Indic state machine to case 19; scalar I2S mutation alone cannot assemble this structurally regular repetition.
one_line: Structural splice duplicates dword token into repetitive block reaching case 19

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage and structural mutators recombine gap/token sequences (repeated f2 a8 00 00 motifs) into syllable layouts that decode as the indic_symbol_cluster category; cmplog's byte-local mutations cannot construct this structured syllable arrangement.
one_line: Token/gap recombination builds syllable structure decoded as indic_symbol_cluster

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's structural splice embeds the 0x0E0E/0x0E0F codepoint bytes within a valid token/gap scaffold that the Thai shaper fully parses as a glyph buffer; the structural context surrounding the codepoint is what cmplog's I2S substitution alone fails to provide.
one_line: Structural scaffold around Thai codepoint enables shaper to reach consonant-type gate

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage gaps variable font bytes and structural mutators splice whole table fragments (cmap, GDEF, GPOS, OTTO sfnt header) into a coherent multi-table font that shifts script detection to a Unicode-7.0+ tag; I2S byte substitution cannot synthesize the structural skeleton.
one_line: Whole-table fragment splicing builds coherent sfnt that resolves to high-Unicode script
